description: Maya from Prague introduces the NFT Tuesday webinar hosted by Binance, highlighting its purpose to provide insights into NFTs for creators, developers, and investors. The session features experts discussing various topics, including a fireside chat with Brendan from Boundly and Liz from Blockworks, and a panel with Juggernaut Ulbit. Participants can win from a $5,000 prize pool by registering and answering questions. Previous events have garnered significant viewership.
topic_summary: The webinar focuses on NFTs, featuring discussions with industry experts and opportunities for audience engagement through prizes. It aims to educate attendees about the evolving digital asset landscape.
